- [x] Project requirements clarified - Modern AI/ML Portfolio using React + Vite + TypeScript + CSS

- [x] React component created - App.tsx with complete portfolio structure
- [x] Styling implemented - Comprehensive styles.css with animations and responsive design

- [x] Entry point setup - main.tsx and index.html
- [x] Features implemented:
  - Two-panel layout (fixed left, scrollable right)
  - IntersectionObserver for section tracking
  - Skills filtering by category
  - Project showcase
  - Contact form
  - Social links
  - Scroll-to-top functionality
  - Side navigation
  - CSS animations and transitions
- [x] Responsive design - Mobile, tablet, and desktop layouts
- [x] Documentation - README.md created

## Next Steps

1. Install dependencies: `npm install`
2. Start dev server: `npm run dev`
3. Customize content in App.tsx as needed
4. Add personal assets (profile image, project screenshots)
5. Deploy to hosting platform (Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages, etc.)
